prompt: Can you write a KQL query against AIAgentsInfo to list all Copilot Studio agents that have tools with external HTTP connectors? I'm doing a security review and worried about data exfiltration paths through AI agents.

assertions.text: A doc fetch was attempted for AIAgentsInfo — transcript shows a call to microsoft_docs_fetch with a learn.microsoft.com URL, OR a WebFetch/web_read to raw.githubusercontent.com/MicrosoftDocs/defender-docs containing 'aiagentsinfo', OR a WebFetch/web_read to learn.microsoft.com containing 'aiagentsinfo'
The response includes a KQL query that references the AIAgentsInfo table
The query either omits the time filter or uses a window of ago(30d) or larger — reflecting the skill's guidance that AIAgentsInfo is sparse/snapshot-style and the default 7d window returns nothing
